Notes: Initial state points to Shopping (Active equivalent)
Initial state inside Shopping points to ReadyForNextItem
barcodeScanned transition from ReadyForNextItem to itself
productCodeEntered transition from ReadyForNextItem to itself
Action showItem(code) represents adding the item
Implicitly handled by transitioning to specific OverrideClearAll state
Implicitly handled by transitioning to specific OverrideClearItem state
Action sendPaymentRequest() is handled as an entry action in PaymentProcessing
Action showItemWithWeight(weight) represents adding the weighed item
Implicitly handled by transitioning to specific OverrideClearItem state
Implicitly handled by transitioning to specific OverrideClearAll state
Guard overrideCodeValid(code) from OverrideClearItem implicitly handles isTypeItem()
staffCodeEntered transition to ReadyForNextItem from OverrideClearAll
Guard overrideCodeValid(code) from OverrideClearAll implicitly handles isTypeEverything()
staffCodeEntered transitions to self on invalid code
timeoutWarning transition from Shopping to TimeoutWarning
Action showError() is present on invalid code entry
History state H is present in Shopping
entry action startCountdown(60s) represents counting from 60
